description_long: This is a round, rustic loaf of bread with a thick, uneven crust that is mottled with patches of white flour. The surface is rugged and craggy, with natural cracks and fissures running across the top, giving it an artisanal appearance. The coloration ranges from golden brown to light tan, with the flour dusting providing a stark contrast. The loaf appears dense and hearty, typical of a country or sourdough bread. There are no visible slices or cuts, and the overall shape is slightly flattened but still domed. The texture of the crust looks crisp and firm, while the interior is likely soft and airy.
description: A rustic, round loaf of bread with a thick, flour-dusted, craggy crust and natural cracks across the surface.
description_view_0: This view highlights a deep central crack and a rugged, flour-dusted crust with pronounced texture.
description_view_1: The loaf appears more rounded from this angle, with the flour dusting and rough surface continuing around the sides.
description_view_2: This side shows a smoother, more continuous crust with fewer deep cracks but still a rustic, uneven surface.
description_view_3: The flour coverage is most prominent here, with a slightly flatter appearance and subtle surface fissures.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick and rugged, with a natural, irregular pattern of cracks and fissures. It is heavily dusted with white flour, giving it a rustic, artisanal appearance.
